name: Slugcat City
description:
You’ve climbed the Exterior and made it to the top, and now you’ve managed to find a vast city filled with many slugcats. You don’t know how you wandered into here, only wanting to know what was inside of the gigantic metallic dome protecting everything inside from the deadly rain. But you feel as if you want to find out more about this safe space for slugcats. The slugcats may welcome you or they may not, it’s all up to them.

[ Game: Rainworld ]
creator: Puggler
